## X-Sense Home Security v1.2.6.61

### Camera AI Notifications
- Adds a native Home Assistant event entity for supported camera AI detection notifications.
- Fires AI detection events for person, pet, vehicle, package, other, and detailed vehicle/package detection types.
- Uses the combined `ai_detection` event type when one camera notification reports multiple detected objects.

### Camera Detection History
- Creates the camera last-detection sensors for supported cameras before the first AI event arrives.
- Keeps last AI detection and related timestamp sensors as history values instead of treating one-shot notifications as binary sensor state.
- Reads the camera person-detection support flag from the APK-style camera metadata instead of hardcoding it off.

### Documentation
- Documents how to use camera AI notifications with Home Assistant's `event.received` automation trigger.
- Adds the notification usage section to all language README files.
